title: The Falling Of The Leaves
content:
Autumn is over the long leaves that love us,
And over the mice in the barley sheaves;
Yellow the leaves of the rowan above us,
And yellow the wet wild-strawberry leaves.
The hour of the waning of love has beset us,
And weary and worn are our sad souls now;
Let us patt, ere the season of passion forget us,
With a kiss and a tear on thy drooping brow.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "The Falling Of The Leaves"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
